summary: The session focused on Jack's concerns about sending confidential mail and his discovery of a special mail service that ensures privacy through encrypted lockers. The user also sought creative solutions to educate low-tech users about the benefits of end-to-end encrypted messaging without delving into technical details.
facts: Jack is worried about sending a confidential letter to his friend due to concerns that postal workers can easily open and read it. Jack meets an employee of a special mail service who offers a solution involving a secure locker for sending letters. The special mail service sends a locker with the letter, accessible only by the sender and receiver using a password. Jack's friend receives the locker and opens it with the password provided by Jack, allowing them to read the confidential letter securely. Jack expresses his satisfaction with the special mail service, stating it is secure and easy to use. Jack encourages others to use the special mail service to protect their privacy. The employee of the special mail service agrees that privacy is essential in the digital age. The user brainstorms ten creative solutions to educate low-tech users about the benefits of end-to-end encrypted messaging without technical jargon. Proposed solutions include creating a benefits brochure, interactive quizzes, public speaking events, user testimonials, social media campaigns, blog articles, infographics, virtual events, booklets, and podcasts.
